title: The Hardest Problem AI Ever Solved: Demis Hassabis on What He's Really Building
description: Demis Hassabis on AlphaFold and the 50-year protein-folding problem, in-silico drug discovery at Isomorphic, AlphaGenome, AlphaGo's move 37, the two AI risks he weights most, and the post-AGI future he sketches — in conversation with Cleo Abram.
